title: if Rei Bought a Car what would It be
display_title: if Rei Bought a Car what would It be
wikitext:
[]: if Rei Bought a Car what would It be             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Feb 17, 2008 1:07 am I thaught it over and come down to the conclution that Rei would own a small car I chose a yaris as Its cheap and Simple also easy to get parts for. I can just see that car fitting her personality. Man did I get abused something shocking when I posted this in THAT-BOARD.com some people are just stupid lol. (I did this image last night at about 2am) Don't link images from THAT BOARD What do you think Rei would drive

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Feb 17, 2008 1:12 am Perfect! This just defines Rei's personality! Simple, cheap and...sexy. I wouldn't choose any other one...

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Feb 17, 2008 10:00 am She'd drive the Batmobile.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Feb 17, 2008 12:09 pm chee wrote: She'd drive the Batmobile.

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Sun Feb 17, 2008 12:24 pm But not for long. KITT would desperately try to strike up a conversation and it would drive off a cliff in sheer frustration over its failure

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Feb 17, 2008 12:28 pm Ayanami, Ayanami, the little clone with a red and yellow car~

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sun Feb 17, 2008 2:40 pm I say Mercedes-Benz S-Class Guard version

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sun Feb 17, 2008 3:24 pm It would be a mini no doubt about that, but it would have to be one of the old minis not these knew shitty ones made by bmw.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun Feb 17, 2008 11:08 pm I think she would get a black Porsche convertable, but then Misato would steal it for a joyride.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Mon Feb 18, 2008 12:33 pm Or how about a trike, not an ordinary one mind you but one with all the leather biker gear on it that looked really badass. (Yes you can drive a trike on a car license so it counts here).

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Feb 18, 2008 2:53 pm mrpanda wrote: Or how about a trike, not an ordinary one mind you but one with all the leather biker gear on it that looked really badass. (Yes you can drive a trike on a car license so it counts here).

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Feb 18, 2008 4:09 pm NO. He would drive a GENERIC ROCKETSHIP.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Mon Feb 18, 2008 4:13 pm Zugzwang wrote: On a sort of related note, as it has three wheels and because of your avatar, a Robin Reliant would suit Shinji perfectly.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 18, 2008 11:29 pm Me.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Tue Feb 19, 2008 3:18 am Of course, why didn't I think of that earlier? Rei prefers stick shift over automatic... heh...heheheh... =P for some reason i can't see Rei driving a mini cooper.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Feb 19, 2008 9:30 am mrpanda wrote: Why my avatar ??

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Feb 19, 2008 11:30 am Zugzwang wrote: On a sort of related note, as it has three wheels and because of your avatar, a Robin Reliant would suit Shinji perfectly.

[]: Re: if Rei Bought a Car what would It be             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Tue Feb 19, 2008 11:50 am Zeak wrote: I thaught it over and come down to the conclution that Rei would own a small car I chose a yaris as Its cheap and Simple also easy to get parts for. I can just see that car fitting her personality. Man did I get abused something shocking when I posted this in THAT-BOARD.com some people are just stupid lol. (I did this image last night at about 2am) Don't link images from THAT BOARD What do you think Rei would drive

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Feb 19, 2008 2:35 pm BobBQ wrote: I think, thematically speaking, that a Reliant Regal Supervan III would be better suited.

[]:             Quote Post by evilhead008 » Tue Feb 19, 2008 8:52 pm A massive, gas-guzzling, fire-spewing, MONSTER TRUCK. Shaped like Lilith. But she'd be a very careful driver.
